arts.ttl: Preview: Millwall vs. Portsmouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Millwall and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: ‘Cheer up’: Controversial Watford and ex-Crystal Palace man hits back at Portsmouth
arts.sum: Kwadwo Baah has hit back at Pompey fans ahead of Watford’s trip to Fratton Park later this month.

arts.ttl: 'Celtic and Rangers wanted to buy me, then I left cash-strapped Portsmouth on a free': Ex-Fratton favourite Marko Futacs
arts.sum: Marko Futacs’ departure was sandwiched between Joel Ward’s sale to Crystal Palace and the termination of one-time skipper Aaron Mokoena’s contract.

arts.ttl: Liverpool signing’s Portsmouth future made clear as Mousinho discusses Fratton exit for starlet
arts.sum: John Mousinho is unconcerned over Harvey Blair’s inability to make a concerted Pompey breakthrough as he sits in the stands.

arts.ttl: John Mousinho's intriguing playing style pledge as he plots evolving Portsmouth into Championship force
arts.sum: With their Championship future at stake, practicality triumphed over principles - but Pompey fans have been told to expect a different playing style next season.
